# UTF-8
#
# Windows version information resource for YT-DLP Studio
# This file defines the metadata shown in Windows Explorer properties
#
# DO NOT EDIT THE VERSION NUMBERS BY HAND.
# The canonical version lives in src/__init__.py (`__version__`).
# Run `python scripts/sync_version.py` to regenerate this file from there.
#

VSVersionInfo(
  ffi=FixedFileInfo(
    filevers=(0, 1, 2, 0),
    prodvers=(0, 1, 2, 0),
    # Contains a bitmask that specifies the valid bits 'flags'
    mask=0x3f,
    # Contains a bitmask that specifies the Boolean attributes of the file.
    flags=0x0,
    # The operating system for which this file was designed.
    # 0x4 - NT and there is no need to change it.
    OS=0x40004,
    # The general type of file.
    # 0x1 - the file is an application.
    fileType=0x1,
    # The function of the file.
    # 0x0 - the function is not defined for this fileType
    subtype=0x0,
    # Creation date and time stamp.
    date=(0, 0)
  ),
  kids=[
    StringFileInfo(
      [
      StringTable(
        u'040904B0',
        [StringStruct(u'CompanyName', u'NX1X LAB - NXTools Collection'),
        StringStruct(u'FileDescription', u'YT-DLP Studio - User-friendly GUI for yt-dlp video downloader'),
        StringStruct(u'FileVersion', u'0.1.2.0'),
        StringStruct(u'InternalName', u'YT-DLP Studio'),
        StringStruct(u'LegalCopyright', u'Copyright © 2024-2026 NX1X. Part of NXTools collection.'),
        StringStruct(u'OriginalFilename', u'YT-DLP Studio.exe'),
        StringStruct(u'ProductName', u'YT-DLP Studio (NXTools)'),
        StringStruct(u'ProductVersion', u'0.1.2'),
        StringStruct(u'Comments', u'Download videos from YouTube. Website: https://nx1xlab.dev/nxtools'),
        StringStruct(u'LegalTrademarks', u'Part of NXtools - https://nx1xlab.dev/nxtools')])
      ]),
    VarFileInfo([VarStruct(u'Translation', [1033, 1200])])
  ]
)
